issue_title: Component change detection is incorrectly shown as default
issue_body_preview:
Augury: 1.19.1
Date: Fri, 14 Sep 2018 02:18:14 GMT
OS: Win32

Demo test application:
https://change-detection-strategy-onpush.stackblitz.io/

Description of issue:
Components that use ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush are incorrectly shown to be using ChangeDetectionStrategy.Default

![change
test_description_zh: 在 Augury 开发者工具中打开一个使用 ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush 策略的 Angular 应用，选中一个已设置为 OnPush 变更检测策略的组件，查看其属性面板中显示的 Change Detection Strategy 信息。
expected_result_zh: 组件的变更检测策略应正确显示为 ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush，而非错误地显示为 ChangeDetectionStrategy.Default。
